content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
suweni geren xusai dorgi de nikan i niyalma udu qoohiyan i niyalma udu
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

I will attempt to translate the provided Manchu sentence into English. Manchu is a Tungusic language, and while it may not be my strongest area, I'll do my best to provide a translation based on the knowledge available to me.

### The sentence seems to refer to people and their actions or states, but without a full context, a precise translation is challenging. A rough approximation might be "The people of the Han (Chinese) and the people of the Mongol (or other ethnic group) are doing something (possibly fighting or engaging in some activity)." Please note that this is a very rough translation and may not be entirely accurate. ###
